summary: Require preview post-dispatch verification to prove hado_styles.css is deployed and referenced by preview HTML.
bugClassification: Preview asset verification gap / external CSS deployment regression
rootCause: After CSS externalization, the preview verification checked source commit and version assets but did not require the deployed HTML to reference hado_styles.css or the CSS file to be publicly retrievable and non-empty. Therefore a missing CSS asset could pass the previous preview freshness checks.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/source CSS change. The fix strengthens preview deployment verification for the already externalized hado_styles.css asset.
workflowResult: pending-after-push; workflow now fails if preview hado_styles.css is missing or not referenced
minimumUserAcceptance: After push, confirm preview hado_styles.css returns CSS content and the page renders styled.
